shell.title: You're making a smart move.
shell.subtitle: A small investment of time and money for real clarity on where your career can go next.

form.intro: Please fill in your details below. Business customers can enter their company info for invoicing.
form.secureNote: Your payment is handled by Stripe. We never see or store your card details.
form.dataNote: Your assessment data stays yours. We don't sell it, we don't share it, and you can permanently delete everything from your account at any time.

validation.firstName: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.lastName: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.acceptTerms: You must accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

errors.title: Checkout Failed
errors.notConfigured: Payment system is not properly configured. Please try again later or contact support.
